security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:1420 ws://127.0.0.1:1420;

bundle.longDescription: Dropply is a premium local-first shared scratchpad for text, files, and images with real-time sync foundations and desktop-first performance.
